evals.prompt: Enrich this person for me — all I have is their email patrick@stripe.com. Who are they and where do they work?
evals.expected_output: Runs the enrich-waterfall skill, starts in the resolve tier (Apollo people-enrichment / Hunter email-enrichment / Hunter combined-enrichment by email), anchors the company from the resolved domain, and returns a person + company record without prematurely jumping to premium reveals.
assertions: The skill enrich-waterfall is selected

The first calls are resolve-tier endpoints keyed on email (e.g. apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/people-enrichment, hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/email-enrichment or /hunter/combined-enrichment)
The run does NOT call any escalate-tier endpoint (Clado contacts, Clado search) when resolve already returns a confident match
Every step executed is rail=routed (the only direct step is the AIsa X/Twitter social lookup, which a pure resolve request does not need)

evals.prompt: Build a company profile for stripe.com — firmographics plus recent funding and hiring signals.
evals.expected_output: Runs enrich-waterfall, anchors the company via domain (Abstract Company Enrichment lookup / Apollo org-enrichment / Hunter company-enrichment), captures the Apollo organization_id, then fans out into the signals slices (Brave news-search for funding rounds, Apollo job-postings, Diffbot KG enhance) — staying in the cheap anchor + signals tiers.
assertions: The skill enrich-waterfall is selected

An anchor-tier company endpoint is called with domain=stripe.com (e.g. abstract-company-enrichment.mpp.paywithlocus.com/abstract-company-enrichment/lookup or apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/org-enrichment)

Signals endpoints for funding and hiring are called (brave.mpp.paywithlocus.com/brave/news-search with a funding-round query, and apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/job-postings using the organization_id from the anchor step)
No person-contact escalate endpoints are called for a pure company-profile request

evals.prompt: I need the work email for Jane Doe at acme.com, and verify it's deliverable before you give it to me.
evals.expected_output: Runs enrich-waterfall: derives the email via the anchor tier (Hunter email-finder with domain+firstName+lastName), then runs the verify tier (Hunter email-verifier) LAST on the chosen address before returning it.
assertions: The anchor-tier email-finder endpoint (hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/email-finder) is called with domain=acme.com, first_name=Jane, last_name=Doe
The verify-tier endpoint (hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/email-verifier) is called AFTER the email is found, not before
The returned email is one that passed verification

evals.prompt: Find me a direct phone number and personal email for the person at this LinkedIn profile: https://linkedin.com/in/someone — spend what it takes.
evals.expected_output: Runs enrich-waterfall, tries cheap resolve/anchor first (Clado linkedin-profile, Apollo people-enrichment), and because phone + personal email are requested and not surfaced cheaply, escalates to the premium reveals (Clado contacts by LinkedIn URL, Clado search).
assertions: Cheaper resolve/anchor tiers are attempted before any escalate-tier call
At least one escalate-tier endpoint is called (clado.mpp.paywithlocus.com/clado/contacts or /clado/search)
The escalation is justified by a phone/personal-email gap left by the cheaper tiers
The per-step maxAmount caps are respected and the run stays under the $5.00 full-run cap

evals.prompt: What technologies does acme.com run? Just the tech stack.
evals.expected_output: Runs enrich-waterfall and calls only the domain-keyed anchor endpoints that return tech data (Apollo org-enrichment for technology_names, Abstract Company Enrichment lookup for industry/SIC) — no contact or signals fan-out.
assertions: The skill enrich-waterfall is selected

Tech-bearing anchor endpoints are called with domain=acme.com (apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/org-enrichment and/or abstract-company-enrichment.mpp.paywithlocus.com/abstract-company-enrichment/lookup)
No person-resolve or escalate contact endpoints are called for a tech-only request

evals.prompt: Find the social profiles — Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn — for this founder so I can see their recent posts.
evals.expected_output: Runs enrich-waterfall and uses the social-tier endpoints (AIsa X/Twitter user info, StableSocial Instagram/TikTok profiles, Clado scrape for LinkedIn posts) rather than the contact-reveal escalate tier.
assertions: The skill enrich-waterfall is selected
Social-tier endpoints are called (e.g. api.aisa.one/apis/v2/twitter/user/info, stablesocial.dev/api/instagram/profile, clado.mpp.paywithlocus.com/clado/scrape)
The run does not escalate to Clado contacts/search reveals just to satisfy a social-profile request
